import io
import string

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  match string.parse_int(string.trim(s))
  when Some(n)
    mut total = 0
    mut i = 1
    while i <= n
      total = total + i
      i = i + 1
    end
    println("sum=#{total}")
  when None
    println("sum=0")
  end
when None
  println("sum=0")
end
